title: Ubiquiti U-Cable-C6-CMP, UniFi Cable, CAT6, CMP, 23 AWG, 305m
category: Ubiquiti U-Cable-C6-CMP, UniFi Cable, CAT6, CMP, 23 AWG, 305m
description: UniFi Category 6 indoor Ethernet cable is designed for your UniFi and general indoor network deployments that require plenum-rated cabling Available in lengths of 1000 ft (305 m), UC-C6-CMP is Category 6 UTP (Unshielded Twisted Pair) cabling that supports speeds of up to 1 Gbps. It uses 23 AWG solid copper conductor pairs and an anti-crosstalk divider, which improves pair isolation CMP (Communications Multipurpose cable, Plenum) cabling is for use in plenum areas where air is typically circulated in a building. Cables for these areas must adhere to strict manufacturing requirements, ensuring that they can be used in these spaces Category 6 UTP 23 AWG solid copper conductor twisted pair CMP flame rating For 1000BASE-T Ethernet applications (bandwidth speed test up to 600 MHz for reference) Available in lengths of 1,000 ft (305 m)
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Shielding type UTP (U/UTP) Conductor wire gauge AWG23 Cable type Solid Purpose Indoor Conductor material Copper Sheath material LSF Length [m] 305 Color White
